json_version_observation.research_finding: Real-time AI supplementation may alter human sensory interpretation.

manuscript_version_observation.interpretation_note: AI-mediated historical narration reframed temporal perception.

critical_findings.title: Ve trigger contradiction
critical_findings.description: The same sample is labeled as self_time_projection in the primary JSON record, but as external_ai_narrative_trigger in the manuscript appendix.
critical_findings.why_it_matters: Ve activation mechanism is a core theoretical field. If this field is unstable, all downstream interpretation, comparison, and model training based on Ve become unreliable.
critical_findings.recommended_resolution: Select one canonical primary trigger in the master record. If both mechanisms are genuinely present, introduce secondary_trigger or trigger_stack instead of allowing cross-version overwrite.

critical_findings.title: Vector-level inconsistency across versions
critical_findings.description: The primary JSON record and the manuscript assign substantially different values to the same sample across Vl, Vr, Vg, Ve, and overall SDIndex.
critical_findings.why_it_matters: This is not a narrative difference. It is a numeric version conflict that undermines reproducibility, benchmark integrity, and auditability.
critical_findings.recommended_resolution: Establish a canonical_record_version and require all manuscripts, appendices, and visualizations to pull directly from that frozen source.

critical_findings.title: AI augmentation reshaped exit-state interpretation
critical_findings.description: The turning point indicates that real-time consultation of Google AI mode transformed the observer's initial intuition into a historically framed interpretation centered on refined loneliness and political dispossession.
critical_findings.why_it_matters: This means the record is not a pure on-site sensory sample. It is a hybrid perception event co-constructed by direct experience and real-time AI narrative input.
critical_findings.recommended_resolution: Add explicit metadata such as exit_state_source and augmentation_bias_flag to mark the sample as AI-reframed perception.

critical_findings.title: Divergence between sensory resilience and Vr is a governance signal, not noise
critical_findings.description: The site is marked as exceptional in sensory resilience, yet Vr is only moderate. The likely cause is not spatial failure, but guided-tour structure and institutional control limiting free stopping, pacing, and self-directed rhythm.
critical_findings.why_it_matters: This indicates that institutional orchestration can suppress experienced rhythm even when the physical environment is highly resilient.
critical_findings.recommended_resolution: Add governance_interference, rhythm_constraint, or guided_constraint_level as explicit explanatory fields.

estimated_effect_on_Ve.json_version_signal: Ve remains relatively low because guided control and managed movement reduce immersive temporal drift.
estimated_effect_on_Ve.manuscript_version_signal: Ve rises sharply because AI-triggered historical narration deepens temporal projection.
estimated_effect_on_Ve.qc_judgment: Ve is currently annotation-unstable and should not yet be treated as a settled gold-standard label.

perception_knowledge_weighting.rationale: The sample's historical depth is not derived solely from immediate sensory input. It is stabilized through real-time AI supplementation, so it cannot be treated as a purely sensory record.
perception_knowledge_weighting.training_risk: If used without explicit metadata, an LLM may incorrectly learn that AI-assisted historical interpretation is a naturally occurring sensory signal available to any observer on site.

outlier_detection.interpretation: This sample shows a high-resilience physical environment combined with only moderate experiential rhythm. The anomaly is best explained by institutional pacing and control rather than weak spatial quality.
outlier_detection.analytical_value: High. It is a strong representative case of human governance interference outweighing physical spatial quality in rhythm formation.

required_actions.detail: Make a formal decision between self_time_projection and external_ai_narrative_trigger, or redesign the schema to support a primary-plus-secondary trigger model.
Confirm the single official vector and SDIndex score for KYT-20260118-A, then align the manuscript and dataset accordingly.
Introduce guided_constraint_level or governance_interference to explain why Vr is compressed despite high sensory resilience.

required_actions.action: Downgrade training confidence until conflict is resolved
required_actions.detail: Temporarily reclassify the sample from clean Gold_Sample to Gold_Sample_Under_Review or Contested_Gold_Sample.

proposed_status_update.reason: Core theoretical fields and numeric vector values remain inconsistent across versions.

one_sentence_summary: KYT-20260118-A is a high-value but high-risk hybrid sample: it captures how real-time AI narrative can reshape historical perception, but its Ve mechanism and vector annotations are currently too unstable for use as a clean sensory gold standard.
